name: @scaffold/adapter-moodle
description: Moodle activity module adapter for Scaffold.

scripts.build: vp run check:artifacts && vp run build:unchecked
scripts.test: vp run check:artifacts && vp run test:unchecked
scripts.test:unchecked: vp test run --passWithNoTests && php tests/assessment_contract_test.php && php tests/learner_activity_contract_test.php && php tests/learner_activity_state_test.php && php tests/learner_activity_api_test.php && php tests/assessment_projection_test.php && php tests/assessment_grade_projection_test.php && php tests/assessment_state_test.php && php tests/assessment_quiz_test.php && php tests/assessment_quiz_external_test.php && php tests/grade_publisher_test.php && php tests/grade_reconciler_test.php && php tests/custom_completion_test.php && php tests/grading_conformance_test.php && php tests/grader_test.php && php tests/payload_test.php && php tests/branding_test.php && php tests/media_service_test.php && php tests/cm_info_contract_test.php && php tests/pluginfile_contract_test.php
scripts.verify: vp run check:artifacts && vp run php:lint && vp run test:unchecked && vp run build:unchecked
